title: Stags’ Leap Winery Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 15, from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a tasting featuring the elegant and expressive wines of Stags’ Leap Winery, a Napa Valley producer known for balancing power, polish, and classic varietal character.

Tasting Fee: $35 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

• Stags’ Leap Winery The Investor Red Wine 2020 – A plush and layered blend with ripe red berries, dark plum, wild lavender, mocha, and a long, spiced finish.

• Stags’ Leap Winery Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 – 93 pts James Suckling – Silky and aromatic with red berries, sweet oak, violet, tea leaf, and a polished finish.

• Stags’ Leap Winery Petite Sirah 2021 – 92 pts Wine Enthusiast – Vibrant and beautifully structured with blackberry pie, boysenberry, thyme, and firm, elegant tannins.

• Stags’ Leap Winery Sauvignon Blanc 2023 – 90 pts Wine Enthusiast – Bright and refreshing with nectarine, tropical fruit, citrus, and a lively, mouthwatering finish.

Discover the depth and finesse of Stags’ Leap Winery—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
